title: Smith Day
compiled_truth: Smith Day is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-06-20 to 2001-09-18), Smith Day sent 13 and received 150 emails, totalling 163 interactions. Top correspondents: [Clint Dean](people/clint-dean) (10), [Lloyd Will](people/lloyd-will) (7), [Jim Homco](people/jim-homco) (5), [Jeffrey Miller](people/jeffrey-miller) (5), [Tom May](people/tom-may) (5).
